title: Snowkingdom Red Christmas Table Runner 10 FT, Glitter Metallic Foil Sheer Tulle Cheesecloth Gauze Runner 120 Inch, Red Table Centerpieces Decoration for Wedding Birthday Party Holiday
features: Package: Pack of 1, 27.5 inch width x 120 inch length. These soft red cheesecloth table runner is sparkling and gorgeous which can meet your daily use for rectangular and round tables

Unique Design: Glittering metallic red foil on a soft sheer fabric in red, similar to a cheesecloth chiffon table runner with a lightweight and flowing. It drapes beautifully over table edges, adding softness and elegant atmosphere

Red Party Table Decorations: Sparkle sheer table runner is perfect for table centerpieces, backdrops, or chairs, arches, mantel. Add some luxury shimmer to your table, easily catch the eyes of your guests
Suitable Scenes: Perfect for Christmas, Valentines Day, Mother's day, Birthday Party, Wedding, Bridal Shower, Baby Shower, Graduations, Anniversary, Holiday, Banquets, Special Events and Daily Use
SPECIALTY: Snowkingdom excels in crafting superior table runner, with these red christmas party table runner being ideal for an elegant, upscale tablescape. Enhance your charm and status
description: Product description Red table runner for birthday party is adorned with delicate red foil on a lightweight sheer fabric, add highlights to your home decor. Easy to match with your red table decorations for a luxurious look.Perfect for Wedding, Christmas party, Birthday party, Valentines Day, Mother's day, Bridal Shower, etc... Great for dinning table decorations. Using them to decorate your coffee table, arches, door or mantle, party background Safety Warning Keep away from young children and pets. Do not use harsh cleaning methods. Dry clean only.
